datasets.name: U.S. Consumer Product Recalls
datasets.description: CPSC consumer product recall records with hazard classification

datasets.name: Deceptive Opinion Spam Corpus
datasets.description: Gold-standard corpus of truthful and deceptive hotel reviews from TripAdvisor

summary_text: Based on analysis of 9,350+ product recalls and 1,600 labeled reviews from public open datasets, consumer protection issues are widespread across categories including fire hazards, choking risks, and fake online reviews.
